realtime_memories.content: You are advising on integrating Serena into a shared MCP surface for a multi-agent coding workspace. Given official Serena docs recommend 'serena start-mcp-server --context=codex --project-from-cwd' f

Given this workspace state: shared MCP surface now includes Serena and FLOSSI0ULLK consensus; Flowith, Groq, and Cerebras are working voter providers; next bottlenecks are shared context/memory, skill
